things.name: Golden Gate Bridge
things.description: Iconic 1937 suspension bridge with spectacular walk or cycle access

things.name: Alcatraz Island
things.description: Fascinating historic federal penitentiary tour in the bay

things.name: Fisherman's Wharf
things.description: Vibrant waterfront district with fresh seafood and sea lions

things.name: Golden Gate Park
things.description: 1,017-acre park with museums, gardens, and bison paddock

things.name: Union Square
things.description: Iconic public plaza surrounded by department stores, upscale boutiques, and grand hotels

things.name: Painted Ladies
things.description: A row of Victorian and Edwardian houses near Alamo Square, famously featured in many films

things.name: Lombard Street
things.description: World's most crooked street with stunning city views

things.name: Palace of Fine Arts
things.description: A monumental structure originally constructed for the 1915 Panama-Pacific International Exposition

things.name: Ghirardelli Square
things.description: Historic landmark with shops, restaurants, and the original chocolate factory

things.name: Coit Tower
things.description: 210-foot tower in the Telegraph Hill neighborhood, offering panoramic views of the city
